shots.story_function: Opening image: the child faces the first threshold between island home and school life.
shots.subject: A 7-year-old Korean island child in a slightly oversized yellow raincoat, navy school backpack, worn sneakers, holding a folded ferry schedule.
shots.setting: A small island ferry pier at early morning, wet wooden dock, coiled rope, low concrete seawall, calm gray-blue sea, faint ferry shape far away.
shots.camera: Child-height 35mm natural lens, slow restrained dolly-in from behind and slightly to the side, ending in a quiet profile close-medium frame.
shots.action: The child stands still near the dock edge, lightly squeezes the backpack strap, looks toward the distant ferry, then exhales with a tiny brave smile.
shots.lighting: Soft misty morning backlight from the camera-left horizon, muted blue-gray sea, yellow raincoat as the warm focal color.

higgsfield_notes.risk: Without a reference image, child identity may drift in later shots; use this only as the first text-to-video smoke test.

shots.story_function: Show nervous anticipation through hands rather than exposition.
shots.subject: Close-up of the child's small hand gripping the navy backpack strap and folded ferry schedule.
shots.setting: Same wet dock, rope and sea blurred in the background.
shots.camera: Locked close-up with minimal handheld breathing.
shots.action: The hand tightens, relaxes, then smooths the folded paper schedule.
shots.lighting: Soft morning side-backlight catching raincoat texture.

higgsfield_notes.risk: Needs reference frame from s01 for sleeve/backpack continuity.

shots.subject: The child in yellow raincoat, with an older guardian's hand entering frame to adjust the hood.
shots.setting: Island pier with ferry sign and seawall.
shots.camera: Medium shot from child height, gentle lateral drift.
shots.action: The guardian adjusts the hood; the child looks down, then back to the sea.
shots.lighting: Warm edge light on raincoat, muted sea background.

higgsfield_notes.risk: Adult should remain partial and not become the main subject.

shots.story_function: The ferry becomes real, turning waiting into departure.
shots.subject: The distant school ferry approaching the small island pier.
shots.setting: Gray-blue morning sea, low horizon, pier edge in foreground.
shots.action: The ferry grows slightly larger through sea haze; gull sounds implied but not shown.
shots.lighting: Soft hazy backlight, no dramatic sunburst.

higgsfield_notes.risk: Avoid turning ferry into a large cruise ship.

shots.subject: The child in yellow raincoat walking one small step toward the boarding point.
shots.setting: Pier boarding area, wet wood and rope, ferry now closer but still secondary.
shots.camera: Low rear tracking shot, slow and steady.
shots.action: The child takes a single hesitant step, then a second more confident step.
shots.lighting: Morning light rim on raincoat and backpack.

higgsfield_notes.risk: Walking motion may become too large; keep action minimal.

shots.story_function: End with the threshold crossed, not with a lecture.
shots.subject: The child's small hand on the ferry rail, yellow sleeve visible.
shots.setting: Ferry entrance with island pier receding behind.
shots.camera: Close-up from inside ferry looking outward, gentle handheld sway.
shots.action: The child's hand settles on the rail; the island pier slowly softens in the background.
shots.lighting: Soft morning light, warmer than opening but still natural.

higgsfield_notes.risk: Needs careful prompt to avoid melodramatic farewell.
